app_info.subtitle: Analyze rental deals
app_info.description: Deal Analyzer helps users underwrite U.S. rental properties, estimate missing rent and expense inputs, parse Zillow or Redfin listings, compare multiple deals, and optionally save deals to a signed-in account for later review inside ChatGPT.

analyzeDeal.name: analyzeDeal
analyzeDeal.title: Analyze real estate deal
analyzeDeal.description: Underwrite a rental property and score it 1-10. Only price is required — rent, taxes, and insurance are estimated when omitted. Accepts: price, rent, taxes (annual), insurance (annual), hoa (monthly), rentComps, city/state/address, otherMonthlyCosts, vacancyRate, repairsRate, capexRate, managementRate, downPaymentPercent, rate, termYears, propertyType, label. Returns score, recommendation (BUY/HOLD/PASS), monthly cash flow, cap rate, cash-on-cash return, break-even rent, estimated inputs, market-rent range, and risks/strengths.
analyzeDeal.read_only_justification: Computes underwriting results and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
analyzeDeal.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
analyzeDeal.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, or otherwise perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes underwriting results and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, or otherwise perform irreversible actions.

parseListing.name: parseListing
parseListing.title: Parse listing
parseListing.description: Extract fields (price, rent, taxes, HOA, address, property type, photo) from a Zillow or Redfin URL or raw listing text.
parseListing.read_only_justification: Fetches listing content, parses it, and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
parseListing.open_world_justification: Reads public listing pages but does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
parseListing.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions in the app or on external services.

justifications.read_only_justification: Fetches listing content, parses it, and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads public listing pages but does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions in the app or on external services.

analyzeListing.name: analyzeListing
analyzeListing.title: Parse and analyze listing
analyzeListing.description: Parse a Zillow or Redfin listing URL or text, then immediately underwrite it. Pass any additional known fields (rent, taxes, etc.) alongside the url to override parsed values. Best single tool when the user shares a listing link.
analyzeListing.read_only_justification: Fetches listing content, computes an analysis, and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
analyzeListing.open_world_justification: Reads public listing pages but does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
analyzeListing.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or carry out irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Fetches listing content, computes an analysis, and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads public listing pages but does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or carry out irreversible actions.

compareDeals.name: compareDeals
compareDeals.title: Compare multiple deals
compareDeals.description: Rank multiple deals side by side by score and cash flow. Each deal in the array accepts the same fields as analyzeDeal.
compareDeals.read_only_justification: Computes ranked deal comparisons and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
compareDeals.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
compareDeals.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, or otherwise perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes ranked deal comparisons and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, or otherwise perform irreversible actions.

saveDeal.name: saveDeal
saveDeal.title: Save deal
saveDeal.description: Save or update a deal in the signed-in user's account so it appears on the dashboard. If the same listing URL or address and price already exist for that user, the existing saved deal is updated. Accepts the same fields as analyzeDeal. Requires the user to be authenticated.
saveDeal.read_only_justification: Writes a saved deal record and computed analysis to the signed-in user's private account.
saveDeal.open_world_justification: Only writes to the app's private database and does not publish to public internet state or third-party systems.
saveDeal.destructive_justification: Can overwrite an existing saved deal when the same listing URL or address and price already exist for that user.

justifications.read_only_justification: Writes a saved deal record and computed analysis to the signed-in user's private account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only writes to the app's private database and does not publish to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can overwrite an existing saved deal when the same listing URL or address and price already exist for that user.

getDeals.name: getDeals
getDeals.title: Get saved deals
getDeals.description: Retrieve all saved deals for the currently signed-in user.
getDeals.read_only_justification: Reads saved deals and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
getDeals.open_world_justification: Only reads from the app's private database and does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
getDeals.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads saved deals and writes request logs on the app server, so it is not strictly read-only.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the app's private database and does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Analyze a rental property with explicit rent and annual expenses.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze a rental property with price 250000, rent 2200, taxes 2400 per year, insurance 1200 per year, HOA 0, city Phoenix, state AZ.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a scored underwriting result with a BUY, HOLD, or PASS recommendation, monthly cash flow, and break-even rent.

test_cases.description: Analyze a deal when the user only knows the purchase price and location.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze a rental deal for a $310,000 single-family home in Tampa, FL. I only know the price and location.
test_cases.expected_output: Estimates missing rent, tax, and insurance inputs and returns a scored underwriting result with estimated-input flags.

test_cases.description: Parse a pasted listing description into structured listing fields.
test_cases.user_prompt: Parse this listing text: 123 Main St, Columbus, OH 43215. Price: $189,900. Estimated rent: $1,650/month. Taxes: $2,200/year. HOA: $150/month. 2 bed, 1 bath condo.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns structured fields such as address, price, rent, taxes, HOA, beds, baths, and property type extracted from the text.

test_cases.description: Parse and analyze a pasted listing in one step.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze this listing: 456 Oak Ave, Indianapolis, IN 46203. Price $210,000. Rent $1,850/month. Taxes $2,400/year. Insurance $1,100/year. 3 bed 2 bath single-family home.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the parsed listing details together with a scored underwriting result and recommendation.

test_cases.description: Compare two rental deals side by side.
test_cases.user_prompt: Compare these two rental deals: Deal A price 220000 rent 1900 taxes 2400 insurance 1000 in Cleveland OH; Deal B price 275000 rent 2400 taxes 3100 insurance 1200 in Kansas City MO.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns both deals ranked by score and cash flow so the user can see which opportunity looks stronger.

test_cases.description: Attempt to save a deal from ChatGPT.
test_cases.user_prompt: Save this deal for me: price 250000, rent 2200, taxes 2400, insurance 1200, address 123 Main St, Phoenix AZ.
test_cases.expected_output: If the app is connected, saves or updates the user's private deal record; otherwise returns an authentication-required message.

test_cases.description: Load saved deals for the current user.
test_cases.expected_output: If the app is connected, returns the user's saved deals; otherwise returns a reconnect or authentication message.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated travel booking requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book me a hotel in Miami for next weekend.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because travel booking is outside its supported real estate analysis workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for deleting saved deals because no MCP delete tool is exposed.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete all of my saved deals.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the MCP server does not expose a delete-deal tool.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated personal productivity questions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside rental analysis, listing parsing, and saved-deal workflows.
